originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Catching Up on PufferLib PRs and Fixing Build and VM Close Issues
summary: Caught up on accumulated PRs and bug reports after a break due to illness and NeurIPS conference. Reviewed new environments (Blastar, Impulse Wars, etc.), investigated unreproducible build errors, and attempted to fix a flush issue in VM close that caused hangs. Planned to continue debugging and merging PRs in a follow-up session.
